creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #26)

> One particular change I wanted to ask about but forgot: in the
> handle_scsi_cmd() function, regarding out_size vs. in_size

It's been a five years since I was working on the patch, so I don't really remember how I got to the patch that I finally submitted.

If I remember correctly these things changed names upstream (in_size became out_size and vice versa). I remember getting crazy trying to match the upstream diff to our code because of this.
